{{Quote|Seven and thirteen are in need of limbs.|Fyzen Gor|<ref name="Last Shot" />}}
'''Thirteen''' was one of the [[medical droid]]s who served in [[Fyzen Gor]]'s [[Original Dozen]]. Two [[Standard year|years]] after being repaired by Gor, the [[droid]] required replacement [[limb]]s. Before Gor could repair the droid, [[Cli Pastayra]] and the [[Wandering Star]] attacked the canyon he was hiding in, capturing both Gor and the surviving droids.<ref name="Last Shot" />

{{Droid-stub}}
